title: Plant Manager (Wastewater Treatment)
description:
Salary & Benefits

  • Basic: $5,000 – $7,000 + Variable Bonus

Working Hours

  • Mon – Fri: 8:00am – 5:00pm

  • Sat: 8:00am – 12:00pm

Location

  • Jurong East

Responsibilities：

  • Safety & EHS Compliance

    • Enforce a zero-harm culture through safety audits, incident investigations, timely closure of findings, and regular safety briefings.

    • Ensure all plant activities comply with EHS regulations and permit requirements.

  • Operations & Plant Uptime

    • Manage daily operations to meet/exceed waste processing throughput targets.

    • Coordinate preventive maintenance with the Maintenance team to minimize unplanned downtime.

    • Provide technical troubleshooting and guidance on treatment systems/equipment (e.g., pumps, clarifiers, filters, chemical dosing/feed systems).

  • Manpower & Team Management

    • Plan shift schedules and manpower deployment to ensure 24/7 or optimal operational coverage.

    • Identify skill gaps and conduct technical/safety training for operators.

    • Set staff KPIs and perform regular performance evaluations.

    • Manage and supervise foreign worker teams.

  • Housekeeping & Facility Standards

    • Implement and maintain 5S and strong housekeeping standards.

    • Ensure chemical stocks, tools, and spare parts are properly stored and readily available.

  • Record Keeping & Reporting

    • Maintain accurate plant logs, discharge quality reports, maintenance records, and safety documentation.

    • Prepare weekly/monthly KPI reports (e.g., cost-per-ton processed, chemical usage, plant efficiency).

  • Continuous Improvement

    • Lead initiatives to reduce chemical consumption, energy usage, and waste-to-landfill ratios.

    • Stay updated on new treatment technologies and propose upgrades to improve performance and reliability.

Requirements：

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Environmental Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or related field.

  • 7–10 years in waste treatment/industrial plant operations, including 3+ years in a management role.

  • Strong knowledge of physical/chemical/biological treatment systems and specialized waste equipment.

    Only shortlisted candidates would be notified

    MTC Consulting Pte Ltd | 15C7752
    EA. Registration No.: R22111807 | Yap Teng Hui
